# Q7 join left + if + comp count distinct (lateral movement rdp)

**Dataset**: `gx_06_rdp` (synthetic scenario lab dataset — the technique transfers to your real datasets)

RDP lateral-movement hunting — remote-desktop connection patterns across hosts. Q7 join left + if + comp count distinct. `count_distinct()` is the distinct-count (never `dcount`); `if(c, a, b)` classifies inline (nest for multi-branch; `case` does not exist).

```sql
dataset = gx_06_rdp | join type = left (dataset = gx_06_hosts) as h h.host = dst_host | alter cj_host = if(tier = "crown-jewel", dst_host, null) | comp count_distinct(dst_host) as all_hosts, count_distinct(cj_host) as cj_hosts by user | sort desc cj_hosts, desc all_hosts
```

_Live-verified on a real XSIAM tenant (returned 5). From the 20-scenario XQL coverage program; technique is dataset-portable._
